description: GraphQL endpoint with paginated queries, cursor-based navigation, and query templates.
Simple HTTP GET to a URL, returns JSON. Full refresh, no pagination. Used by iTrent-style APIs.
Standard REST API with offset/page-based or cursor pagination. Supports GET and POST.
CSV, Excel, or Parquet files dropped to Azure Blob Storage or ADLS. ADF copies files to landing.
Direct database connection via JDBC. Used for SQL Server, PostgreSQL, Oracle source reads.
OData-compliant API with $filter, $select, $expand. Used by Dynamics 365, SAP, SharePoint.
